pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Pink Heart 100％ and 400% Set
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Be@rbrick Pink Heart 100% and 400% Collectible Set!  These figures stand at approximately 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature a bright colorful pattern of pink hearts.  Be sure to add this collectible figure to your collection today!
